中文: 人格麻將 · 遊戲規則
用卡牌拼出你的人格 — Big Five 五大人格 × 麻將玩法
English: Build your personality with cards — Big Five traits × Mahjong play
and gets a score for five dimensions:

中文: 開放性 O、盡責性 C、外向性 E、宜人性 A、神經質 N。
English: Openness O, Conscientiousness C, Extraversion E, Agreeableness A, Neuroticism N.

中文: 。每個維度需要的牌數 = 你在該維度的分數
English: . The number of cards each dimension needs = your score in that dimension
. The first to complete all five dimensions "

中文: 每人依自己的人格分數發一手牌（分數越高，起手牌越多）。
English: Each player is dealt a hand based on their personality scores (higher score = bigger starting hand).

中文: 桌面中央為抽牌堆；打出的牌進入棄牌堆（抽牌堆摸完會把棄牌堆洗回，牌不會用盡）。
English: The draw pile sits in the center; discarded cards go to the discard pile (when the draw pile runs out, the discard pile is reshuffled back in, so cards never run out).

中文: 牌庫含少量「知識牌」，見第六節。
English: The deck contains a few "Knowledge cards" — see section 6.

中文: ① 從抽牌堆摸 1 張
English: ① Draw 1 from the draw pile

中文: ② 從手牌打出 1 張
當有人打出一張人格牌，若你手上有同維度的牌、加上這張剛好湊滿該維度所需張數，可宣告「碰」：
English: When someone discards a personality card, if your hand has cards of the same dimension that — together with this card — exactly complete the count that dimension needs, you may declare "Pong":

中文: 把這組牌歸檔，並立刻搶到出牌權（不用摸牌，直接打一張）。
English: Declare that set, and immediately seize the turn (no draw — discard one right away).

中文: 自己回合也能用手牌湊齊宣告（自摸碰），每回合限一次。
English: On your own turn you can also complete a set from your hand (Self-draw Pong), once per turn.

中文: ⚠ 張數必須剛好、且全為同維度。張數錯／維度錯／碰已歸檔的維度 → 失敗受罰。
English: ⚠ The count must be exact and all of the same dimension. Wrong count / wrong dimension / Pong on an already-declared dimension → failed and penalized.

中文: 當手牌能一次湊齊所有尚未歸檔的維度 → 宣告胡牌，立即獲勝。
English: When your hand can complete all not-yet-declared dimensions at once → declare a win and win immediately.
When a Pong or Win declaration fails——

中文: 下次輪到你時罰停一回合（自動跳過、不抽不出），期間不能碰／胡／搶牌。
English: On your next turn you are frozen for one turn (auto-skipped, no draw or discard), and cannot Pong / Win / claim during it.

中文: 碰失敗只亮出你押錯的牌；胡失敗亮出整手牌。
English: A failed Pong only reveals the cards you wrongly bet; a failed Win reveals your whole hand.

中文: → 想清楚再宣告，賭錯代價很大。
English: → Think before you declare — a wrong bet costs a lot.

中文: 牌庫中有少量知識牌（上面是心理學小知識）。它不屬於任何維度、不能用來湊牌。打出知識牌不會觸發別人搶牌（安全棄牌）。數量很少，偶爾摸到、打掉即可。
English: The deck has a few Knowledge cards (psychology trivia on them). They belong to no dimension and cannot be used to complete sets. Discarding a Knowledge card does not let others claim it (safe discard). They are rare — just discard them when you draw one.

中文: 有人食胡 → 該玩家直接獲勝。
English: If someone Wins (Hu) → that player wins outright.

中文: 打滿約定輪數仍無人胡 → 按已歸檔維度數排名，多者勝；同數則比剩餘手牌少者勝。
English: If the agreed number of rounds is played and no one wins → rank by number of Declared dimensions, most wins; on a tie, fewer remaining hand cards wins.

中文: 掃描頁首 QR code 即可開始 ·
English: Scan the QR code above to start ·

中文: 棄 1 張 → 開啟判讀窗口
宣告失敗 → 罰停 1 回合、亮牌
English: Failed call → frozen 1 turn, cards shown

中文: 每回合 1 次：翻開 2 張看維度
English: Once a turn: flip 2 cards to see dimensions

中文: 退出 → 座位永久跳過
無人胡 → 比已歸檔維度數
English: No win → rank by declared dimensions

中文: 從首頁點「聯機對戰」。這裏不是直接進牌桌，而是先進入聯機大廳。
English: Tap "Online Match" on the home page. This does not take you straight to the table — it opens the online lobby first.

中文: 只輸入學號，並再次輸入學號確認。學號用於防止同一個人同時佔兩個活動房間的座位。
English: Just enter your student ID, then re-enter it to confirm. The student ID prevents one person from occupying two active rooms at once.
Check Whether You Have Been Assessed

中文: 已測評：系統會用你的五維分數生成本局目標張數。未測評：會先引導去測評，否則你的目標張數沒有依據。
English: Assessed: the system uses your five-dimension scores to generate this game’s target counts. Not assessed: you are guided to the assessment first, otherwise your target counts have no basis.

中文: 測評結果會影響每個維度需要歸檔幾張，所以不同玩家的胡牌路線不同。
English: Your assessment result determines how many cards each dimension needs to declare, so different players have different paths to a Win.

中文: 創建房間 / 加入房間
房主創建房間後拿到房間碼並等待其他玩家；非房主輸入房間碼加入。4 個真實玩家坐齊後才適合開始。
English: The host creates a room, gets a room code, and waits for others; non-hosts enter the room code to join. It is best to start once 4 real players are seated.

中文: 房主負責點開始。進入牌桌後，所有人的手牌維度默認不公開，只能靠描述、記憶和每回合查看能力判斷。
English: The host taps start. Once at the table, everyone’s hand dimensions are hidden by default — you rely on descriptions, memory, and your per-turn view ability to judge.

中文: 從首頁點「單機對戰」。如果沒有測評結果，會先去測評；如果已經測評，直接進入單機設置大廳。
English: Tap "Single Player" on the home page. If you have no assessment result, you go to the assessment first; if already assessed, you go straight to the single-player setup lobby.

中文: 簡單偏隨機，中等會做基礎歸檔判斷，困難會更積極推測你的牌。
English: Easy is more random, Medium makes basic declaration judgements, and Hard guesses your cards more aggressively.

中文: 5 / 10 / 15 / 無限都可以。無限會一直打到有人食胡或牌局自然結束。
English: 5 / 10 / 15 / Unlimited all work. Unlimited keeps going until someone Wins or the game ends naturally.

中文: 單機固定是你 + 3 個 AI。AI 會按自己的策略抽牌、棄牌、碰牌和食胡。
English: Single player is always you + 3 AI opponents. The AI draws, discards, Pongs, and Wins by its own strategy.

中文: 進入牌桌後流程和聯機一致：抽牌、查看、歸檔、棄牌、響應別人棄牌。
English: Once at the table the flow matches online play: draw, view, declare, discard, and respond to others’ discards.

中文: 5 個人格維度（開放性、盡責性、外向性、宜人性、神經質）全部完成「公開歸檔」，先達成的玩家獲勝。每個維度需要湊多少張，取決於你自己的測評分數 —— 所以每個人的「胡牌路線」都不一樣。
English: Complete a "Declared" set for all 5 personality dimensions (Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Neuroticism); the first player to do so wins. How many cards each dimension needs comes from your own assessment score — so every player has a different path to a win.

中文: 單機固定 4 人（你 + 3 個 AI）；聯機 1 到 3 名玩家。牌堆會依人數縮放。牌分兩類：帶顏色標記的「人格描述牌」（屬於某一維度），以及無維度歸屬的「檔案註記 / 知識牌」（中立，可棄可觀察對手風格）。
English: Single player is always 4 players (you + 3 AI); online is 1 to 3 players. The draw pile scales with the player count. Cards come in two kinds: color-tagged "personality description cards" (belonging to one dimension), and the dimensionless "Knowledge cards" (neutral — discardable, and useful for reading opponents’ styles).

中文: 初始手牌張數 = 5 個維度目標張數之和 − 1。少的那張要靠「碰」或「食胡」補齊。
English: Starting hand size = the sum of all 5 dimension targets − 1. The missing card must be completed via "Pong" or "Win".

中文: 輪到你時，先點擊牌堆抽 1 張。如果你願意，可以一次性開啓「查看 2 張牌」的特權 —— 每回合最多 1 次，把任意 2 張未知的手牌真實人格揭開。用完即重置到下次回合。
English: On your turn, first tap the draw pile to draw 1 card. If you wish, you can activate the "view 2 cards" privilege once — at most once per turn — to reveal the true personality of any 2 unknown cards in your hand. It resets at the start of your next turn.

中文: 抽完後選 1 張你不需要的丟到中間的棄牌堆。被棄出的牌進入「心理判讀窗口」，其他 3 名玩家有幾秒鐘決定是否要「碰」（同維度歸檔）或「食胡」（直接勝利）。
English: After drawing, pick 1 card you do not need and discard it to the pile in the middle. The discarded card opens a "psychological read window" where the other 3 players have a few seconds to decide whether to "Pong" (same-dimension declaration) or "Win" (instant victory).

中文:
把同維度的牌湊齊目標張數即可歸檔。兩種觸發方式：
• 自摸碰（你自己回合內，每回合最多 1 次）→ 從你的「手牌 + 剛抽到的牌」裏挑選恰好「該維度目標張數」張同維度牌；
• 截胡碰（claim 窗口內先點先得）→ 從手牌挑選「該維度目標張數 − 1」張同維度牌，加上那張棄牌正好湊齊；
選錯維度、混入其他人格牌、張數不對 → 視爲「碰失敗」，會被罰停（見下「罰停」一節）。
系統不會告訴你「這個維度你夠了」，5 個未歸檔維度全部讓你選，需要自己判斷。
English: The system will not tell you "you have enough for this dimension"; all 5 unsealed dimensions are offered, so you must judge for yourself.

中文:
當你的牌（已歸檔 + 手中 + 這張待判定牌）正好完成全部 5 個維度時，按下「食胡」。
觸發時機：
• 你的回合中（自摸食胡）；
• 任意人棄牌進入判讀窗口時（截胡食胡）。
判定不成立 → 食胡失敗，整副手牌公開並罰停。
English:
When all of your cards exactly completes target counts for all 5 dimensions, press "Win".
When to trigger:
• During your own turn (self-draw Win);
• When anyone discards and the read window opens (claim Win).
If the judgement fails → the Win fails, your whole hand is revealed and you are frozen.

中文:
「碰失敗 / 自摸碰失敗 / 食胡失敗」三者懲罰相同：下次輪到你時罰停一回合，自動跳過（不抽牌、不出牌）後立即解除。
罰停期間：
• 你押錯的那幾張牌（碰 / 自摸碰）或整副手牌（食胡）立即公開；
• 任何人棄牌進入判讀窗口時，你都不能參與（不能碰、不能食胡）。
所有玩家都會在你頭像下看到「⛔ 罰停中」標識。
English:
A "failed Pong / failed self-draw Pong / failed Win" all carry the same penalty: you are frozen for one turn — on your next turn it is auto-skipped (no draw, no discard) and then immediately cleared.
While frozen:
• The cards you wrongly bet (Pong / self-draw Pong) or your whole hand (Win) are revealed immediately;
• You cannot take part when anyone discards and the read window opens (no Pong, no Win).
All players see a "⛔ Frozen" badge under your avatar.

中文: 一次誤判 ≈ 損失下一個出牌回合，務必想清楚再下手。罰停期間也不能宣告食胡。
English: One misjudgement ≈ losing your next discard turn, so think carefully before acting. You also cannot declare a Win while frozen.

中文: 查看 2 張牌（每回合 1 次）

手牌人格默認不顯示維度，必須靠記憶和推理。但你可以在自己回合開始抽完後，啓用「🔍 查看 2 張牌」一次性把 2 張手牌的真實維度揭開。本回合內有效，下回合自動重置。
用得好的玩家會優先看自己最不確定的牌，避免歸檔時混入錯誤。
English:
Hand cards hide their dimension by default — you rely on memory and reasoning. But after drawing at the start of your turn, you can activate "🔍 view 2 cards" once to reveal the true dimensions of 2 hand cards. It applies this turn only and resets automatically next turn.
Good players prioritize their least-certain cards to avoid mixing errors when they declare.

中文:
牌堆裏有一類無人格歸屬的「檔案註記 / 知識牌」 —— 內容是心理學課程概念（術語 + 定義）。它們不能用於歸檔，但也不會"穿幫"成錯誤維度。
用途：
• 抽到就丟，騰出手牌空間；
• 也是觀察對手心理風格的趣味設計（看對手怎麼挑這些中性牌可以暴露偏好）。
English:
The draw pile contains a class of dimensionless "Knowledge cards" — their content is psychology course concepts (term + definition). They cannot be used to declare, but they also never "out" you as the wrong dimension.
Uses:
• Discard them when drawn to free up hand space;
• They are also a playful way to read opponents’ psychological styles (how an opponent picks these neutral cards can reveal preferences).

中文:
聯機房 2–4 人，任何人點「退出對局」即從該桌退出 —— 不接管，剩下的玩家繼續打到分勝負。
• 退出者的座位永久跳過（看到「🚪 已退出對局」徽章）；
• 僅剩 1 人即自動宣告該玩家勝利；
• 你的回合超過 30 秒未操作會彈「請注意：現在是你的回合」提醒，每 30 秒重複一次直到你出牌。
同學號同時進入兩個活動房間會被拒絕 —— 防止兩個客戶端共享同一座位。
English: The same student ID entering two active rooms at once is rejected — preventing two clients from sharing one seat.

中文: 第一個完成全部 5 維度歸檔的玩家直接獲勝。若打滿約定輪數仍無人胡，則按排名結算：先比已歸檔維度數（多者勝），同數再比剩餘手牌（少者勝）。
English: The first player to declare all 5 dimensions wins outright. If the agreed rounds run out with no Win, ranking decides it: compare declared dimension counts first (more wins), then on a tie compare remaining hand cards (fewer wins).

中文: 第一步 · 選擇要歸檔的人格維度
English: Step 1 · Choose the dimension to declare

中文: 罰停一回合演示：本輪不能參與別人棄牌的判讀窗口，下次輪到你時自動跳過。
English: Frozen-for-one-turn demo: you cannot join others’ read windows this round, and your next turn is auto-skipped.

中文: 小明棄出了一張線索牌
English: Xiao Ming discarded a clue card

中文: 食胡只在 5 個維度都完成時按。判定不成立會公開整副手牌並罰停，所以它是確認勝利，不是試探按鈕。
English: Press Win only when all 5 dimensions are complete. A failed judgement reveals your whole hand and freezes you, so it confirms victory — it is not a probing button.
Discard 1 card to end the turn ↓

中文: 這是你的開局：手牌裏有多種人格描述和 1 張檔案註記。你需要先抽牌，再決定要查看、歸檔還是棄牌。
English: This is your opening: your hand has several personality descriptions and 1 Knowledge card. You must draw first, then decide whether to view, declare, or discard.

中文: 每回合可以查看 2 張手牌的真實維度。點擊「查看 2 張」後，再繼續進入歸檔判斷。
English: Each turn you may view the true dimensions of 2 hand cards. After tapping "View 2", continue on to the declaration judgement.

中文: 看牌桌上方的「目標張數」：神經質要 4 張。數數高亮的手牌——正好 4 張神經質，湊夠了！點高亮的「自摸碰」開始。
English: Look at the "Targets" board above: Neuroticism needs 4. Count the highlighted hand cards — exactly 4 Neuroticism, just enough! Tap the highlighted "Self-draw Pong" to start.

中文: 失敗會公開你押錯的牌並罰停一回合（下次輪到你時自動跳過）。點「繼續」回到選牌模式。
English: A failure reveals the cards you wrongly bet and freezes you for one turn (your next turn is auto-skipped). Tap "Continue" to return to card-picking.

中文: 自摸碰成功！4 張公開歸檔鎖定。現在點一張手牌準備棄掉，結束回合。
English: Self-draw Pong complete! 4 cards are locked in the declared area. Now tap a hand card to discard and end the turn.

中文: 確認要棄這張嗎？點「棄牌」結束回合，或「取消」換一張。
English: Discard this one? Tap "Discard" to end the turn, or "Cancel" to pick another.

中文: 現在是別人棄牌後的判讀窗口。你可以截胡碰，也可以在已經滿足全部目標時食胡。
English: This is the read window after someone discards. You can Claim Pong, or Win if you have already met every target.

中文: 截胡碰也會形成公開歸檔。下一步示範「食胡」（宣告勝利）。
English: A Claim Pong also forms a declaration. Next, a demo of "Win".

中文: 食胡是勝利按鈕，只在所有目標完成時使用。失敗成本很高，所以不要拿它試錯。
English: Win is the victory button, used only when all targets are complete. Failure is costly, so do not use it for trial and error.

中文: 食胡成功！五個維度全部集齊，你贏了。
English: You win! All 5 dimensions are complete.

中文: 你的回合結束。下一步模擬別人棄牌後的「碰 / 食胡」窗口。
English: Your turn is over. Next, simulate the "Pong / Win" window after someone else discards.

中文: 抽到一張線索牌。現在選擇很多，先演示「查看 2 張牌」。
English: Drew a clue card. There are many options now — first let’s demo "view 2 cards".

中文: 本回合查看了 2 張牌：一張盡責性，一張神經質。真實牌局裏只會揭開你選的 2 張。
English: This turn you viewed 2 cards: one Conscientiousness, one Neuroticism. In a real game only the 2 you pick are revealed.

中文: 現在你知道剛抽到的牌能補齊一組。下一步演示自摸碰。
English: Now you know the just-drawn card can complete a set. Next, a demo of Self-draw Pong.

中文: 自摸碰要先選定一個人格維度。提示：手牌裏有 4 張「神經質」，選它。
English: Self-draw Pong needs you to fix a dimension first. Hint: your hand has 4 "Neuroticism" cards — choose it.

中文: 歸檔成功。4 張進入公開歸檔區，歸檔後必須立即棄 1 張牌。
English: Declared. The 4 cards enter the open declaration area; after declaring you must immediately discard 1 card.

中文: 出牌完成。現在切到別人棄牌時，你如何響應「碰 / 食胡」。
English: Discard done. Now switching to how you respond with "Pong / Win" when someone else discards.

中文: 截胡碰成功。你用手裏 2 張同類牌 + 對手棄牌完成了一組公開歸檔。
English: Claim Pong succeeded. You completed a declaration using 2 same-type cards from your hand + the opponent’s discard.

中文: 食胡用於宣佈勝利：當 5 個維度全部完成時按下。誤按會公開整副手牌並罰停。
English: Win declares victory: press it when all 5 dimensions are complete. Pressing it by mistake reveals your whole hand and freezes you.

中文: 食胡成功！五維集齊，宣告勝利。
English: You win! All 5 dimensions complete — victory declared.
An opponent discards a personality card

中文: 直接生成本局目標張數。
English: Generate this game’s target counts directly.
Take the test first, then return to the lobby.
